name: The Fool
meaning_upright: New beginnings, optimism, trust in life.
desc: A young man stands on the edge of a cliff, looking out into the world.

name: The Magician
desc: With one hand pointed to the sky and the other to the ground, he bridges the worlds.

name: The High Priestess
meaning_upright: Intuition, sacred knowledge, divine feminine, the subconscious mind.
meaning_reversed: Secrets, disconnected from intuition, withdrawal and silence.
desc: She sits at the gate of the mystery, between the pillars of light and dark.
